subcodes.first_line: O ye two advancers towards the Kingdom of God! I supplicate to God that ye may be enkindled, like unto two candles, with the light of the love of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مقبل بملکوت الله از خدا خواهم که هر دو مانند شمع بنور محبت الله روشن
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @predictions and prophecies
